auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Shodan API key passed as the key query parameter. Get it from your account page at https://account.shodan.io.

actions.name: count_search_results
actions.description: Count Shodan hosts matching a query and optionally return facet aggregations.

query.description: Search query string passed to the Shodan host count endpoint.

facets.description: Facet aggregation string such as org:5,country:3.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for counting Shodan host search results.

facets.description: Raw JSON object returned by Shodan.

outputSchema.description: Normalized host count results returned by Shodan.

actions.name: get_api_info
actions.description: Get API account information and remaining credits from Shodan.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Shodan API account information.

plan.description: Subscription plan name returned by Shodan.

https.description: Whether HTTPS scanning access is enabled for the API key.

monitored_ips.description: Number of monitored IP addresses currently tracked by the account.

query_credits.description: Remaining query credits available to the API key.

scan_credits.description: Remaining scan credits available to the API key.

telnet.description: Whether telnet access is enabled for the API key.

unlocked.description: Whether unlocked search filters are enabled for the API key.

unlocked_left.description: Remaining unlocked query credits available to the API key.

usage_limits.description: Raw JSON object returned by Shodan.

outputSchema.description: API account information returned by Shodan.

actions.name: get_domain_info
actions.description: Get DNS domain information and known subdomains from Shodan.

domain.description: Domain name to inspect in the Shodan DNS endpoint.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Shodan domain information.

items.description: One tag returned by Shodan for the requested domain.

tags.description: Tags returned by Shodan for the requested domain.

items.description: Raw JSON object returned by Shodan.

data.description: List of raw JSON objects returned by Shodan.

items.description: One subdomain label returned by Shodan.

subdomains.description: Known subdomain labels returned by Shodan.

more.description: Whether Shodan has additional subdomain data beyond the current payload.

outputSchema.description: Normalized domain information returned by Shodan.

actions.name: get_host
actions.description: Get Shodan host details for one IP address.

ip.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to inspect in Shodan.

history.description: Whether to include historical banners for the host.

minify.description: Whether to request a minified host payload from Shodan.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Shodan host details.

host.description: Raw JSON object returned by Shodan.

outputSchema.description: Normalized host details returned by Shodan.

actions.name: resolve_hostnames
actions.description: Resolve hostnames to IP addresses with the Shodan DNS resolve endpoint.

items.description: One hostname to resolve in Shodan.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for resolving hostnames with Shodan.

additionalProperties.description: Resolved IP address returned by Shodan.

results.description: Mapping of hostname to resolved IP address returned by Shodan.

outputSchema.description: Normalized hostname resolution results returned by Shodan.

actions.name: reverse_dns_lookup
actions.description: Reverse-resolve IP addresses to hostnames with the Shodan DNS reverse endpoint.

items.description: One IP address to reverse-resolve in Shodan.

ips.description: IP addresses to reverse-resolve with Shodan.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reverse-resolving IP addresses with Shodan.

items.description: One hostname returned by Shodan for the IP address.

additionalProperties.description: Hostnames returned by Shodan for one IP address.

results.description: Mapping of IP address to hostnames returned by Shodan.

outputSchema.description: Normalized reverse DNS results returned by Shodan.

actions.name: search_hosts
actions.description: Search Shodan hosts with a query string and optional facet aggregation.

query.description: Search query string passed to the Shodan host search endpoint.

facets.description: Facet aggregation string such as org:5,country:3.

page.description: 1-based results page to request from Shodan.

minify.description: Whether to request minified banner results from Shodan.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching hosts in Shodan.

items.description: Raw JSON object returned by Shodan.

matches.description: List of raw JSON objects returned by Shodan.

facets.description: Raw JSON object returned by Shodan.

outputSchema.description: Normalized host search results returned by Shodan.
